calibration_notes: Rank 6 (3-Chamber Pipeline-Parallel 2603.21092) is essentially the candidate mechanism (3 chambers, intake/compute/emit, pipeline-parallel inference). Rank 5 (Phase-Aware Continuous Batching 2511.18065) directly covers phase-aware chunking. Rank 8 (Sequence-Position Rotor 2509.14920) covers rotor-style scheduling across sequence positions. Rank 2 (HF continuous batching) and Rank 3 (vLLM) cover the continuous-batching baseline that WANKEL-INFER explicitly extends. Rank 7 (STAR decode-phase) shares phase-rescheduling intent. Rank 4 (AWQ) is unrelated quantization. Rank 1 (Wankel Wikipedia) is the source domain only.

results.title: Wankel engine — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source domain article; no LLM-inference content. Below all thresholds.

results.title: Continuous batching (HF)
results.rationale: Baseline continuous batching that WANKEL-INFER extends with phase chambering; functional overlap on dynamic batching of inference phases. func>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: vLLM
results.rationale: High-throughput serving engine implementing continuous batching and prefill/decode pipelining; functional overlap with WANKEL-INFER's chamber pipeline. func>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: AWQ quantization (2023/6)
results.rationale: Weight quantization, orthogonal to phase-aware chambered pipelining. Below all thresholds.

results.title: Phase-Aware Continuous Batching for Long-Context LLMs (2025/11)
results.rationale: Directly matches phase-aware continuous batching content word; near-identical mechanism. Hit on all three criteria.

results.title: 3-Chamber Pipeline-Parallel Inference Engine (2026/3)
results.rationale: Title explicitly names 3-chamber intake/compute/emit pipeline; essentially the candidate mechanism. Strong hit on all three criteria.

results.title: STAR Decode-Phase Rescheduling (2025/10)
results.rationale: Phase-aware rescheduling of decode shares the phase-segmentation principle; functional overlap. func>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: Sequence-Position Rotor Scheduling for Inference (2025/9)
results.rationale: Rotor-style scheduling across sequence positions matches the rotor-cycle inference state content word; near-identical to the chamber-rotation idea. Hit on all three criteria.

verdict_rationale: Six of eight results hit, including two arxiv items (2603.21092, 2511.18065) that directly instantiate the 3-chamber phase-aware pipeline mechanism, plus a rotor-position scheduler (2509.14920). Mechanism is anticipated by prior/concurrent work; WANKEL-INFER is not novel.
